items.title: 8-K — Results of Operations · Regulation FD Disclosure · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Rand Capital Q3 2025 NII $0.33/share amid loan repayments, $28M liquidity
items.snippet: Rand Capital Q3 2025 NII of $0.33/share on total investment income of $1.6M; company received $8.3M in loan repayments and ended the quarter with nearly $28M in liquidity.

items.title: 8-K — Auditor Changes · Financial Statements and Exhibits
8-K — Results of Operations · Regulation FD Disclosure · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Rand Capital Q2 2025 NII jumps to $0.83/share on capital gains fee reversal
items.snippet: Rand Capital Q2 2025 NII of $0.83/share driven largely by a non-cash capital gains incentive fee reversal tied to a write-down of its Tilson investment.

items.headline_ai: Rand Capital Q1 2025 NII rises 45% to $0.42/share as expenses fall 36%
items.snippet: Rand Capital Q1 2025 NII rose 45% to $1.2M or $0.42/share; total expenses fell 36% year-over-year; company raised $0.29/share Q2 2025 dividend and had over $22M in available credit

items.headline_ai: Rand Capital 2024 investment income grows 17%, NAV rises 7% to $25.31/share
items.snippet: Rand Capital full year 2024 total investment income grew 17% to $8.6M; NAV rose 7% to $25.31/share; quarterly dividend raised 16%; total 2024 dividends of $5.03/share.

items.title: 8-K — Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Rand Capital Q4 2024 stock-and-cash dividend results in 389,000 new shares issued
items.snippet: Rand Capital's Q4 2024 $4.20/share stock-and-cash dividend resulted in approximately 389,000 new shares issued at $22.30, with the total cash component capped at 20% of the $10.8M

items.title: 8-K — Regulation FD Disclosure · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Rand Capital shareholders elect cash or stock for $4.20/share Q4 2024 dividend
items.snippet: Rand Capital notifies shareholders of their right to elect cash or stock for the $4.20/share Q4 2024 dividend; 80% paid in newly issued shares, 20% in cash, payable January 24, 202

items.title: 8-K — Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Rand Capital declares $4.20/share stock-and-cash special dividend for Q4 2024
items.snippet: Rand Capital declares a $4.20/share Q4 2024 dividend of approximately $10.8M in aggregate, paid 80% in stock and 20% in cash, including gains from the $7.7M SciAps realized gain.

items.title: 8-K — Results of Operations · Regulation FD Disclosure · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Rand Capital Q2 2024 investment income rises 18%, NAV up 11% to $26.56
items.snippet: Rand Capital Q2 2024 total investment income rose 18% to $2.1M; NAV increased 11% to $26.56/share; SciAps expected to be acquired in 2024; Q3 2024 dividend of $0.29/share declared.

items.title: 8-K — Results of Operations · Regulation FD Disclosure · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Rand Capital Q1 2024 investment income rises 12%, raises dividend 16% to $0.29
items.snippet: Rand Capital Q1 2024 total investment income grew 12% to $2.1M; regular quarterly dividend raised 16% to $0.29/share for Q2 2024; $10.8M deployed into new investments.

items.title: 8-K — Submission of Matters to a Vote
8-K — Results of Operations · Regulation FD Disclosure · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Rand Capital full year 2023 investment income rises 27%, NAV gains 5%
items.snippet: Rand Capital full year 2023 total investment income rose 27% to $7.3M; NAV grew 5% to $23.56/share; paid $1.33/share in dividends, up 60% from 2022; deployed $20.3M in investments.

items.title: 8-K — Other Events
8-K — Results of Operations · Regulation FD Disclosure · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Rand Capital Q2 2023 investment income rises 34%, NAV up 3% to $23.79
items.snippet: Rand Capital Q2 2023 total investment income rose 34% to $1.8M; received $6.8M in proceeds from a portfolio sale with $2.5M gain; declared $0.25/share Q3 2023 dividend.

items.title: 8-K — Results of Operations · Regulation FD Disclosure · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Rand Capital Q1 2023 investment income surges 65%, raises dividend 25% to $0.25
items.snippet: Rand Capital Q1 2023 total investment income rose 65% to $1.85M; regular quarterly dividend raised 25% to $0.25/share for Q2 2023; adjusted NII/share rose 86% to $0.39.

items.title: 8-K — Submission of Matters to a Vote
8-K — Results of Operations · Regulation FD Disclosure · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Rand Capital full year 2022 investment income rises 41%, NAV $22.36/share
items.snippet: Rand Capital full year 2022 total investment income rose 41% to $5.8M; NAV $22.36/share; total 2022 dividends of $0.83/share, up nearly 90% year-over-year.

items.title: 8-K — Material Definitive Agreement · Material Off-Balance-Sheet Obligation · Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Rand Capital closes $25M senior secured revolving credit facility with M&T Bank
items.snippet: Rand Capital closes a $25M senior secured revolving credit facility with M&T Bank, replacing its prior SBA arrangement, to fund future portfolio investments.

items.headline_ai: Rand Capital completes 1-for-9 reverse stock split effective May 21, 2020
items.snippet: Rand Capital completes a 1-for-9 reverse stock split, reducing shares outstanding from approximately 23.8M to 2.6M, with post-split trading beginning May 22, 2020.

items.headline_ai: Rand Capital Q1 2020 results include $23.7M special RIC dividend and 1-for-9 split plan
items.snippet: Rand Capital Q1 2020 announces a $23.7M special dividend at $1.62/share tied to its RIC election, plus a planned 1-for-9 reverse split; NAV $3.69/share; sold Outmatch Holdings for

items.title: 8-K — Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Rand Capital announces special dividend election results: 69% chose stock
items.snippet: Rand Capital reveals 69% of shareholders elected stock for the $23.7M special RIC dividend; $19.0M paid in shares at $2.20; $4.7M in cash; approximately 8.6M new shares issued.

items.title: 8-K — Submission of Matters to a Vote
8-K — Regulation FD Disclosure · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Rand Capital notifies shareholders of $1.62/share special dividend stock-or-cash election
items.snippet: Rand Capital notifies shareholders of the $1.62/share special dividend payable May 11, 2020, with the right to elect cash or stock; cash payout capped at 20% of the total $23.7M.

items.title: 8-K — Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Rand Capital declares $1.62/share special dividend tied to RIC election
items.snippet: Rand Capital declares a $23.7M special dividend of $1.62/share in connection with its plan to elect regulated investment company tax status beginning 2020.
